title: P27 A/B/K Symbolic Kummer CAS Brief

target.goal: find a sourceable or recurrent Kummer relation that beats independent sqrt-scale half-loss

positive_evidence: selected gates descend to whole A fibers in p27 samples through d14
A, B, K, and Sroot fixtures are exact coordinate views of the same selected classes
Dplus post-gate d3/d4 descends to A
reduced B-line equation gives an explicit f3 cover
gamma transition gives an exact staged f4/f3 class
V4 factorization names alpha/beta phase classes
negative_boundary: visible A-line degree <= 4 branch support killed
A-line S3, affine, PGL2, hidden-X power, and Chebyshev recurrences killed
low-degree B-line plane relations for reduced fibers killed through degree 20
fixed prefix filters do not provide source-normalized shrink
online Magma is too small for the localized reduced-cover genus/component extraction

cas_tasks.name: normalize_legal_core_f3_cover
required_outputs: function field or normalized curve for selected legal/core source
branch divisor degree and support field degrees for U+2

cas_tasks.name: extract_f4_over_f3
required_outputs: classify gamma as pullback, coboundary, translate, quotient class, or fresh cover
record V4 alpha/beta transformations under H sign and sheet signs

cas_tasks.name: repeat_one_layer
required_outputs: construct the f5/f4 analogue after f4-plus

promote_if: explicit quotient/Prym factor carries multiple selected classes
direct sampler beats independent half-loss with source-normalized margin
kill_if: legal/core f3 cover is high-genus/generic after quotients
only source is an all-chart artifact outside selected legal domain
only GPU proposal is a one-bit filter or phase bucket with no raw-source win

online_outputs.status: calculator temporarily disabled; no dimension/genus result yet

gpu_result_references.commit: 11c89c8 Add p27 recurrence coupling GPU telemetry
gpu_result_references.verdict: no sign-word/gamma bucket promoted; max heldout all-plus residual lift 1.053x below 1.25x bar
